title: Bee Removal in Yorktown Heights, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Yorktown Heights, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive removal and relocation. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: When bees establish hives around your Yorktown Heights property, you need swift and humane removal from experienced professionals. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, effective bee removal services throughout Yorktown Heights and surrounding Westchester communities, protecting your family while preserving these important pollinators. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of bee infestations in both residential neighborhoods and the wooded areas common throughout Yorktown Heights.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Yorktown Heights homeowners for years with safe, eco-friendly bee removal that prioritizes both your safety and environmental responsibility. Our team arrives fully equipped with protective gear and specialized tools, offering transparent pricing between $350-$550 and guaranteed results for your Yorktown Heights property.
localContext: Yorktown Heights' tree-lined streets, historic properties near the Yorktown Museum, and homes surrounding Franklin D. Roosevelt State Park create ideal nesting environments for honeybees and carpenter bees. The area's mix of older colonial homes and newer developments near Heritage Hills requires experienced technicians familiar with diverse architectural styles and bee behavior in suburban Westchester settings.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Yorktown Heights?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Yorktown Heights typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive size, location accessibility, and bee species. Ground nests and easily accessible hives fall on the lower end, while second-story or wall cavity removals may cost more. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination. Honeybees are essential pollinators, so we work with local beekeepers to relocate hives safely. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted removal methods that minimize environmental impact while ensuring your Yorktown Heights property is completely safe.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Yorktown Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Yorktown Heights and Westchester County. Most bee removal jobs are completed within 2-4 hours, depending on hive size and location. We understand that bee infestations pose immediate safety risks, especially for those with allergies, so we prioritize rapid response times.

faqs.question: What types of bees are common in Yorktown Heights?
faqs.answer: Yorktown Heights properties commonly encounter honeybees, carpenter bees, and bumblebees. Carpenter bees often damage wooden structures like decks and siding, while honeybees may establish large colonies in wall voids, attics, or trees. Our technicians are trained to identify each species and apply the appropriate removal technique for your specific situation.
